节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides interfaces to sync distributed object.
The information about the database bound to the asset.
The name of store where the asset resides.
The name of table where the asset resides.
The Primary key of the rdb table where the asset resides.
The field(column) name of the rdb table where the asset resides.
Name of the asset to be bound. When the column type is Assets, this field refers to the asset name of one of the assets.
Create distributed object.
注释信息: @param { object } source - Source Init data of distributed object.

parameters.说明: Source Init data of distributed object.

节点.功能描述: Generate a random sessionId.
The response of save. Contains the parameter information of the save object.
sessionId of saved object
version of saved object, can compare with DistributedObject.__version
deviceid that data saved data is "local", means save in local device otherwise, means the deviceId of others device
The response of revokeSave. Contains the sessionId of the changed object.
The sessionId of the changed object.
Indicates the observer of object data changed.
注释信息: @param { string } sessionId - The sessionId of the changed object.
@param { Array<string> } fields - Property names of changed data.

节点.功能描述: Indicates the observer of object status changed. 'offline'  The object became offline on the device and the object can not sync any data; 'restored' The object restored success.
注释信息: @param { string } sessionId - The sessionId of the changed object.
@param { string } networkId - The networkId of the changed device.
@param { string } status 'online'   The object became online on the device and data can be synced to the device;

节点.功能描述: Defines a callback used to return the asset sync progress. 100 indicates that the asset sync is complete and -1 indicates that the asset sync failed.
注释信息: @param { string } sessionId - Session ID of the observed object.
@param { number } progress - Asset sync progress. The value range is -1 to 100, where

节点.功能描述: Save object, after save object data successfully, the object data will not release when app existed, and resume data on saved device after app existed. the saved data secure level is S0, it is not safe, can only save public data, if there is privacy data, you should encrypt it The saved data will be released when 1. saved after 24h. 2. app uninstalled. 3. after resume data success, system will auto delete the saved data. {SaveSuccessResponse}: The response of save. 2. Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates the device that will resume the object data.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: Indicates the device that will resume the object data.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Save object, after save object data successfully, the object data will not release when app existed, and resume data on saved device after app existed. the saved data secure level is S0, it is not safe, can only save public data, if there is privacy data, you should encrypt it. The saved data will be released when 1. saved after 24h. 2. app uninstalled. 3. after resume data success, system will auto delete the saved data. 2. Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - Indicates the device that will resume the object data.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: Indicates the device that will resume the object data.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Revoke save object, delete saved object immediately, if object is saved in local device, it will delete saved data on all trusted device. if object is saved in other device, it will delete data in local device. {RevokeSaveSuccessResponse}: The response of revokeSave.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Incorrect parameter types.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Incorrect parameter types.
Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Revoke save object, delete saved object immediately, if object is saved in local device, it will delete saved data on all trusted device. if object is saved in other device, it will delete data in local device.

节点.功能描述: Mark an attribute of a distributed object as an asset type. This interface must be called before setSessionId. 1. The assetKey is invalid, such as ""; 2. The uri is invalid, such as "".
注释信息: @param { string } assetKey - Indicates the key of the asset type in Object.
@param { string } uri - Indicates the uri of asset.
@returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the function.
@throws {BusinessError} 15400003 - The sessionId of the distributed object has been set.

parameters.说明: Indicates the key of the asset type in Object.
Indicates the uri of asset.

节点.return_description: The promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
The sessionId of the distributed object has been set.

节点.功能描述: Marks an attribute of a distributed object as an asset array type. This interface must be called before setSessionId. 1. The assetsKey is invalid, such as ""; 2. The uris is invalid, such as the length of uris is more than 50.
注释信息: @param { string } assetsKey - Indicates the key of the asset type in Object.
@param { Array<string> } uris - Indicates the uri array of asset.
@returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the function.
@throws {BusinessError} 15400003 - The sessionId of the distributed object has been set.

parameters.说明: Indicates the key of the asset type in Object.
Indicates the uri array of asset.
